name: ExtensionActorDefinition_Documentation
title: R5: Functionality associated with the actor (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ActorDefinition.documentation` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ActorDefinition.documentation` 0..1 `markdown`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `ActorDefinition.documentation` 0..1 `markdown`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ActorDefinition.documentation` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ActorDefinition` is not mapped.
Element `ActorDefinition.documentation` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Functionality associated with the actor (new)
element.comment:
Element `ActorDefinition.documentation` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ActorDefinition` is not mapped.
Element `ActorDefinition.documentation` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
In general terms, the description desribes what the actor is, and this element describes what the actor does (or is expected to do).

element.definition: Documentation about the functionality of the actor.
element.comment: In general terms, the description desribes what the actor is, and this element describes what the actor does (or is expected to do).
